title: API Documentation
subtitle: A composable component model — GeoMap provides the container, and everything else is composed as children.

gettingStarted.title: Getting Started
gettingStarted.description: BrownieJS uses a composable component model. GeoMap provides the map container with tile rendering. TileLayer, Marker, MarkerCluster, Popup, Circle, Route, and Geolocation are composed as children.
gettingStarted.exampleNote: GeoMap provides the map container and context. TileLayer renders OSM tiles. Marker, Route, and Geolocation are composed as children.
gettingStarted.coordDescription: BrownieJS uses [longitude, latitude] order — the GeoJSON standard — for all coordinate props (center, coordinates, bounds). This is the opposite of Leaflet, which uses [lat, lng].
gettingStarted.coordLeafletMigration: Migrating from Leaflet? Flip your coordinates: Leaflet's [lat, lng] becomes [lng, lat] in BrownieJS.

geomap.title: GeoMap
geomap.description: The root map container component. Provides a tile-based map with configurable center and zoom, auto-sizing via ResizeObserver, zoom and pan navigation, and context for all child components. Exposes an imperative handle via ref with flyTo(), fitBounds(), getZoom(), getCenter(), and getBounds().
geomap.imperativeDescription: GeoMap accepts a ref that exposes methods for programmatic control — useful when you need to navigate the map from outside the component tree (e.g. a "use my location" button).
geomap.imperativeSignatures:
flyTo(options: FlyToOptions): void
flyTo(center: [number, number], zoom?: number): void
fitBounds(bounds: { sw: [number, number]; ne: [number, number] }, padding?: number): void
getZoom(): number
getCenter(): [number, number]
getBounds(): { sw: [number, number]; ne: [number, number] }
geomap.imperativeFlyToNote: flyTo() animates to the target position using RequestAnimationFrame. Accepts an optional duration (default 300ms) and easing function. Respects prefers-reduced-motion: if the user has reduced motion enabled, the map jumps instantly instead of animating.

props.style: CSS styles for the map container.
props.className: CSS class name for the map container.
props.bounds: Initial bounds to fit the map to.
props.width: Fixed width in pixels (auto-sizes if omitted).
props.height: Fixed height in pixels (auto-sizes if omitted).
props.mapLabel: Accessible label for the map container.
props.onZoomChange: Fires during zoom with current zoom level.
props.onMoveEnd: Fires when a zoom or pan interaction ends.
props.onClick: Called when the map is clicked.
props.showAttribution: Show the tile attribution overlay. Default: true.
props.isLoading: When true, renders the loader placeholder instead of the map. Use while async data (markers, routes, etc.) is being fetched.
props.loader: Custom loader element to render when isLoading is true. Defaults to the built-in <Loader /> component.
props.interactiveZoom: Enables zoom via scroll wheel, pinch gesture, and double-click. Set to false to lock the zoom level while still allowing pan. Default: true.
props.onError: Called when an error is thrown inside the map. Receives (error: Error, info: React.ErrorInfo). Use to connect error monitoring services like Sentry or Datadog.

marker.title: Marker
marker.description: Renders a marker at a geographic coordinate. Supports custom SVG children, drag-and-drop, click handlers, and tooltips.

props.children: Custom SVG content. Replaces default circle when provided.
props.icon: Custom ReactNode to replace the default marker icon.
props.onDragEnd: Called when drag completes with new geographic coordinates.
props.data: Arbitrary data to associate with the marker.
props.animated: Enable enter animation (fade-in + slide) when the marker mounts.

route.title: Route
route.description: Draws an SVG path along a series of geographic coordinates. Supports custom stroke styling, dashed lines, OSRM routing integration, and tooltips.

props.coordinates: Array of geographic coordinates [longitude, latitude] defining the route.
props.onClick: Called when the route path is clicked.
props.onMouseEnter: Called when mouse enters the route path.
props.onMouseLeave: Called when mouse leaves the route path.
props.onRouteLoaded: Called when OSRM route data loads.
props.animated: Enable ant trail animation along the route path.
props.animationSpeed: Duration of one animation cycle in seconds.

geolocation.title: Geolocation
geolocation.description: Accesses the browser Geolocation API to track the user's position. Can continuously watch position changes with configurable accuracy and timeout.

props.maximumAge: Maximum age of cached position in milliseconds.
props.onError: Called when a geolocation error occurs.

tilelayer.title: TileLayer
tilelayer.description: Renders a tile grid from a URL template (e.g., OpenStreetMap). Must be placed inside GeoMap.

markercluster.title: MarkerCluster
markercluster.description: Groups nearby Marker children into clusters using a grid-based algorithm. Automatically re-clusters on zoom changes.

props.radius: Cluster grid cell size in pixels.
props.maxZoom: Zoom level above which markers are not clustered.
props.renderCluster: Custom render function for cluster markers.
props.onClick: Called when a cluster is clicked.
props.animated: Enable smooth transition animations when clusters merge or split.
props.categoryKey: Data key used to group markers into categories within clusters.
props.categoryColors: Map of category values to colors for multi-category cluster rendering.

popup.title: Popup
popup.description: An HTML overlay positioned at geographic coordinates. Can be used standalone or as a child of Marker.

props.coordinates: Geographic position [longitude, latitude]. Inherited from parent Marker if omitted.
props.offset: Pixel offset [x, y] from the anchor position.
props.closeOnClick: Whether clicking the map closes the popup.
props.onClose: Called when the popup is closed.
props.className: CSS class for the popup container.
props.style: Inline styles for the popup container.
props.image: Optional hero image displayed above the popup content.

circle.title: Circle
circle.description: Renders an SVG circle on the map with a geographic center and radius in meters.

props.onClick: Called when the circle is clicked.

tooltip.title: Tooltip
tooltip.description: A lightweight overlay that displays content at a pixel position. Typically used with mouse events on markers or routes.

props.className: CSS class for the tooltip container.
props.style: Inline styles for the tooltip container.

mapcontrol.title: MapControl
mapcontrol.description: Positions child controls in a corner of the map. Use with built-in controls (ZoomControl, ScaleBar) or any custom content.

props.children: Control content to render in the map corner.
props.className: CSS class for the control container.
props.style: Inline styles for the control container.

svglayer.title: SVGLayer
svglayer.description: A custom SVG overlay layer. Provides a project() render prop that converts geographic coordinates to pixel positions, allowing you to draw arbitrary SVG shapes on the map.

props.children: Render function receiving '{ project }' for coordinate-to-pixel conversion.
props.className: CSS class for the SVG container.
props.style: Inline styles for the SVG container.

htmllayer.title: HTMLLayer
htmllayer.description: A custom HTML overlay layer. Provides a project() render prop that converts geographic coordinates to pixel positions, allowing you to render arbitrary HTML elements on the map.

props.children: Render function receiving '{ project }' for coordinate-to-pixel conversion.
props.className: CSS class for the HTML container.
props.style: Inline styles for the HTML container.

loader.title: Loader
loader.description: A standalone map placeholder component rendered while async data loads. Used automatically by GeoMap when isLoading is true, and can also be used independently — for example, before a lazy-loaded map component mounts.

props.ariaLabel: Accessible label for the loading region. Announced by screen readers. Default: "Loading map".
props.className: CSS class name applied to the loader container.
props.style: Inline CSS styles applied to the loader container. Merged with default layout styles.

useMap.title: useMap
useMap.description: Returns the map context including viewport state, projection functions, and the flyTo() method for programmatic navigation. Must be used inside GeoMap.
useMap.returns: MapContextValue with project(), invert(), flyTo(), center, zoom, width, height.

useGeolocation.title: useGeolocation
useGeolocation.description: Wraps the browser Geolocation API. Returns the user's position, loading state, and errors. By default continuously watches via watchPosition().
useGeolocation.returns: '{ position: { latitude, longitude, accuracy }' | null, error, loading '}'

useOsrmRoute.title: useOsrmRoute
useOsrmRoute.description: Fetches road routing geometry from an OSRM-compatible API. Features in-memory caching and AbortController cleanup.
useOsrmRoute.returns: '{ data: { coordinates, distance, duration }' | null, loading, error '}'

useReverseGeocode.title: useReverseGeocode
useReverseGeocode.description: Calls the Nominatim (OpenStreetMap) reverse geocoding API to resolve coordinates into an address.
useReverseGeocode.returns: '{ data: { road, suburb, city, state, country, postcode, displayName }' | null, loading, error '}'

headlessHooks.title: Headless Hooks
headlessHooks.description: Headless hooks provide the logic and state for map components without rendering any UI. Use them to build fully custom components with your own markup and styling.

usePopup.title: usePopup
usePopup.description: Manages popup positioning, auto-flip, and visibility state. Returns style and props to spread on your custom popup element.
usePopup.returns: '{ style, isVisible, isFlipped, close, props, popupRef }'

useTooltip.title: useTooltip
useTooltip.description: Manages tooltip positioning relative to a pixel coordinate. Returns style and props for your custom tooltip element.

useMarker.title: useMarker
useMarker.description: Manages marker positioning, drag state, and viewport culling. Returns style, handlers, and state for your custom marker element.

useCircle.title: useCircle
useCircle.description: Computes the pixel center and radius for a geographic circle. Returns SVG props and container style for your custom circle element.

useRouteLayer.title: useRouteLayer
useRouteLayer.description: Computes the SVG path data for a route and optionally fetches OSRM routing. Returns path data and loading state for your custom route element.

useGeolocationDot.title: useGeolocationDot
useGeolocationDot.description: Tracks the user's GPS position and computes pixel coordinates for the dot and accuracy ring. Returns position data and state for your custom geolocation element.
useGeolocationDot.returns: '{ position, dotCenter, accuracyRadiusPx, containerStyle, error, loading }'

useMapLayer.title: useMapLayer
useMapLayer.description: Provides projection functions and map dimensions for building custom layers. A convenience wrapper around useMap() optimized for layer rendering.
useMapLayer.returns: '{ project, invert, width, height, zoom, center }'
useMapLayer.circleMarkerNote: BrownieJS's Circle component uses a geographic radius in meters — it scales with zoom. For a fixed pixel-size dot that stays the same size regardless of zoom (equivalent to Leaflet's CircleMarker), use useMapLayer with a plain SVG circle and a fixed pixel r:

theming.title: Theming
theming.description: All BrownieJS components support visual customization via CSS custom properties (variables). You can set them globally on your map container or use MapThemeProvider for a React-friendly API.
theming.cssVariablesDescription: Set any --bm-* variable on a parent element to theme all BrownieJS components within it. Available variables: --bm-popup-bg, --bm-popup-color, --bm-popup-radius, --bm-popup-shadow, --bm-tooltip-bg, --bm-tooltip-color, --bm-tooltip-border, --bm-tooltip-radius, --bm-tooltip-shadow, --bm-marker-color, --bm-circle-color, --bm-circle-fill, --bm-route-color, --bm-geolocation-color, --bm-attribution-bg, --bm-focus-ring, --bm-control-bg, --bm-control-color, --bm-control-shadow, --bm-control-radius, --bm-control-padding, --bm-control-gap.
theming.providerDescription: A React component that converts a theme object into CSS custom properties. Import from @brownie-js/react/theme. Accepts camelCase keys that map to --bm-* variables (e.g. popupBg becomes --bm-popup-bg).

controls.title: Built-in Controls
controls.description: Ready-to-use map controls imported from @brownie-js/react/controls. Use them inside MapControl to position them on the map.

zoomControl.title: ZoomControl
zoomControl.description: Provides zoom in (+) and zoom out (-) buttons with keyboard accessibility.

scaleBar.title: ScaleBar
scaleBar.description: Displays a distance scale bar that updates with the current zoom level. Supports metric and imperial units.

props.maxWidth: Maximum width of the scale bar in pixels.
